base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ghost_frightened_warning — a character from 1980 pac man. Frightened-ending flash — alternates blue-body and white-body rapidly (warning ~2s before frightened-mode expires and ghosts return to chase-mode). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Frightened-ending flash — alternates blue-body and white-body rapidly (warning ~2s before frightened-mode expires and ghosts return to chase-mode)

nudges.delta: alternate to white-body rapidly (warning ~2s before frightened-mode expires and ghosts return to chase-mode)
